[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000000 a
1 100111100 5
2 010111100 5
3 001001000 2
4 010100110 4
5 100000100 2
6 110100110 5
7 111011000 5

56 65 111111110 8

70 07 110111101 7
